# Pizza Truck — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Pizza Truck is a mobile pizza business operating out of a food truck. The brand is centered around serving fresh, delicious pizza on the go, bringing a casual and fun street food experience to customers wherever they are.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Craving bold, cheesy, oven-fresh pizza on the go? Pizza Truck brings the ultimate Food &amp; Beverage street food experience straight to your neighborhood. Find us today!

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Pizza Truck
Pizza Truck is a mobile pizza business operating out of a food truck. The brand is centered around serving fresh, delicious pizza on the go, bringing a casual and fun street food experience to customers wherever they are.

## Target Audience
- Lunchtime Office Workers
- Event Organizers
- College Students

## Industry
Food & Beverage

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
